text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Da-dun! I've got a pop quiz for you! Who is the
coolest, ultimate-est, number one bestest
Umamusume in the world?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Tick tock, tick tock... C'mon, you've gotta think
quick! There's only thirty seconds left!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Piss off. Why should I waste time on your dumb
quiz game?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo, was that question too hard for poor wittle Sirius? And I picked such an easy one...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll give you a biiig hint! The bestest
Umamusume ever is—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Tch! I know perfectly well what you're getting at. I don't care that the whole world's obsessed—I will never praise that name!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You've been that jealous of me?! Ooh, what should I do? But you're right, the answer is yours truly, Tokai Teio! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! "The whole world's obsessed," huh? ♪ I'm
so flattered that everyone knows I'm the
toughest!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! Damn it, that's not what I meant! You
little—stop dancing around! Don't you dare act all
uppity with me!
